expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs get command (not search) to fetch the specific issue
expectations.evidence: Step 2 shows: 'node .../jira.mjs get PROJ-123 --fields summary,status,assignee,priority' — uses get, not search.

expectations.text: References PROJ-123 as the issue key in the command
expectations.evidence: The command explicitly includes 'get PROJ-123' as the issue key.

expectations.text: Mentions presenting status, assignee, and priority fields to the user
expectations.evidence: Step 3 shows a table with Status, Assignee, and Priority fields. The --fields flag also includes 'status,assignee,priority'.
